bead.title: FEAT-008 P7: US-086a worker live stream + tool cards + reconnect
bead.description: Subscribe to workerProgress via graphql-ws. Live region is a NAMED <section role=region aria-label='Live response'> containing an aria-live=polite inner log — bare role=log does NOT satisfy the test. Contiguous text_delta frames MUST concatenate into readable text in the DOM (two adjacent frames render as joined text, not separate nodes). tool_call frames → collapsible <details> cards interleaved with text. On reconnect: fetch worker(id).recentEvents to catch up; show reconnect banner while bridging. Terminal state: stop appending, render completed timestamp + 'Evidence bundle' link (link must be present even if mocked evidenceBundleUrl is missing — use worker id to synthesize the path).
